fields.name: Primary Key
fields.tooltip: This field is used internally.

fields.name: Whse. Receipt Nos.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number series code to use when you assign numbers to warehouse receipt journals.

fields.name: Whse. Put-away Nos.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number series code you want used when you assign numbers to warehouse put-away documents.

fields.name: Whse. Pick Nos.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number series code you want used when you assign numbers to warehouse pick documents.

fields.name: Whse. Ship Nos.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number series code you want used when you assign numbers to warehouse shipment journals.

fields.name: Registered Whse. Pick Nos.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number series code you want to be used to assign numbers to registered pick documents.

fields.name: Registered Whse. Put-away Nos.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number series code used when numbers are assigned to registered put-away documents.

fields.name: Require Receive
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether you require users to use the receive activity.

fields.name: Require Put-away
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether you require users to use the put-away activity.

fields.name: Require Pick
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether you require users to use the pick activity.

fields.name: Require Shipment
fields.tooltip: Specifies if warehouse shipments are required in warehouse work flows.

fields.name: Last Whse. Posting Ref. No.
fields.tooltip: This object supports the Microsoft Dynamics NAV infrastructure and is intended only for internal use.

fields.name: Receipt Posting Policy
fields.tooltip: Specifies what should happen if errors occur when warehouse receipts are posted.

fields.name: Shipment Posting Policy
fields.tooltip: Specifies what should happen if errors occur when warehouse shipments are posted per source document.

fields.name: Copy Item Descr. to Entries
fields.tooltip: Specifies if you want the description on item cards to be copied to warehouse entries during posting.

fields.name: Posted Whse. Receipt Nos.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number series code used to assign numbers to posted warehouse receipts.

fields.name: Posted Whse. Shipment Nos.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number series code used to assign numbers to posted warehouse shipments.

fields.name: Whse. Internal Put-away Nos.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number series code used to assign numbers to internal put-always.

fields.name: Whse. Internal Pick Nos.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number series code used to assign numbers to internal picks.

fields.name: Whse. Movement Nos.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number series code used to assign numbers to warehouse movements.

fields.name: Registered Whse. Movement Nos.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number series code used to assign numbers to registered warehouse movements.
